title: ranunculus calthifolius
intro: Ranunculus calthifolius, also known as the Yellow Sea Buttercup, is a flowering plant species native to China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Ranunculus calthifolius include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. The plant is often prepared for medicinal use through herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures.
